completed_scope.infidelity: correct trend and matching edge regimes

remaining_targets.reason: The reconstructed schedule gives 0.42-0.68x of the paper curve. Acceptance agreement rules out a first-order noise-scale error; the residual is in second-order damaging-pair combinatorics controlled by unpublished gate/idle ordering.
Exact wall-clock equality depends on the authors' code versions, hardware, compiler/runtime, and benchmark harness.

compute_assessment: No additional large compute is required to establish the current scientific result. More shots would reduce Monte Carlo error but would not identify the unpublished schedule detail.
proxy_policy: The exact-circuit acceptance and infidelity data supersede the earlier proxy curves for T001/T002; runtime remains explicitly labeled as proxy timing.
